name: kntnt-wp-skills
description: Kntnt's WordPress-skills plugin — mirror a live WordPress site down into a local DDEV copy: `clone` a fresh copy of production, or `pull` to refresh an existing one, driven solely through the Novamira MCP; or `mkwp` to scaffold a brand-new local site from nothing.

plugins.name: kntnt-wp-skills
plugins.description: Mirror a live WordPress site down into a local DDEV copy, or scaffold a brand-new one from nothing. Three user-invoked skills: `clone` creates a fresh local copy of a production site and `pull` refreshes an existing one incrementally, both reaching production solely through the Novamira MCP — never over SSH; `mkwp` scaffolds a brand-new local site standalone.
